---
title: "Streamflow (Q)"
output: html_document
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

STEP 2 of the pipeline (runs AFTER Boundaries.py).

Purpose
-------
Pull daily USGS streamflow (parameter 00060) for every site inside the AOI
(Illinois River Basin). No COMID mapping here — COMID is assigned later in
`Catchments.Rmd`.

End-state of this file
----------------------
**`q_obs`** — one row per (site_no, Date) with streamflow in m^3/s.
Saved to `daily_drivers_dir/q_obs.parquet` for consumption by Watertemp.Rmd.

```{r setup, message=TRUE, warning=TRUE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

# Shared paths, packages, helper functions
source("SRC/Functions_Paths.R")
```

```{r load-aoi}
# Load AOI produced by Boundaries.py
aoi <- st_read(basin_shp, quiet = TRUE) %>%
  st_transform(4326)   # WGS84 for NWIS/NLDI queries

bbox <- st_bbox(aoi)
```

```{r find-q-sites}
# Find candidate USGS daily-value sites with streamflow (00060) inside AOI bbox
q_site_meta <- whatNWISdata(
  bBox        = c(bbox["xmin"], bbox["ymin"], bbox["xmax"], bbox["ymax"]),
  service     = "dv",
  parameterCd = "00060"
) %>%
  filter(!is.na(dec_lat_va), !is.na(dec_long_va)) %>%
  distinct(site_no, .keep_all = TRUE)

site_ids <- unique(q_site_meta$site_no)
cat("Found", length(site_ids), "candidate Q sites in AOI.\n")
```

```{r pull-q}
# -------------------------------
# Pull Daily Streamflow (00060)
# -------------------------------
start_date <- "1984-01-01"
end_date   <- "2026-04-01"

q_raw <- readNWISdv(
  siteNumbers = site_ids,
  parameterCd = "00060",   # streamflow (cfs)
  startDate   = start_date,
  endDate     = end_date
)
```

```{r clean-q}
# Standardize column names, convert cfs -> m^3/s
q_obs <- renameNWISColumns(q_raw) %>%
  mutate(
    q_m3s = Flow * 0.0283168   # 1 cfs = 0.0283168 m^3/s
  ) %>%
  select(site_no, Date, Flow, q_m3s)
```

```{r save-q}
# End-state of this file: Q measurements
q_out <- file.path(daily_drivers_dir, "q_obs.parquet")
write_parquet(q_obs, q_out)

cat("\nQ summary:\n")
print(q_obs %>% summarise(
  n_rows   = n(),
  n_sites  = n_distinct(site_no),
  min_date = min(Date, na.rm = TRUE),
  max_date = max(Date, na.rm = TRUE)
))
```

```{r qc-plots}
# QC plots: missingness + unit sanity
ggplot(q_obs, aes(x = Date, y = site_no)) +
  geom_tile(aes(fill = is.na(q_m3s))) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("TRUE"="red","FALSE"="white")) +
  labs(title="Missing Streamflow Data", x="Date", y="Site")

ggplot(q_obs, aes(x = q_m3s)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 50, fill="skyblue", color="black") +
  labs(title="Streamflow Distribution (m^3/s)", x="Flow (m^3/s)", y="Count") +
  xlim(0, quantile(q_obs$q_m3s, 0.99, na.rm=TRUE))
```
